    "Physical damper positions do not match the certified Testing, Adjusting, and Balancing (TAB) report settings."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Re-align and secure dampers to match the specified TAB report positions",
    "Re-verify system airflow and static pressure balance",
    "Lock damper quadrants in place to prevent future drift"

  "rationale": "A mismatch between physical damper positions and the TAB report indicates the system is not balanced to design specifications, which violates SMACNA standards and project submittals, potentially leading to improper airflow distribution and energy inefficiency.",
